data.name: BDSM Sex - Futanari
data.detailed_description:
An adult visual novel about a curious young woman whose fascination leads her into a deep exploration of submission and the intense pleasure only her Mistress can offer.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Ava has always been curious, but some desires are harder to ignore than others.

When her friend begins telling her stories about a Mistress unlike any other, she can’t stop thinking about them.

Despite her nerves, she decides to see it for herself.

What begins as a single session quickly becomes something far more intense.

Under the commanding presence of the elegant and dominant Mistress, Ava discovers pleasures she never imagined, and a secret her Mistress has been keeping.

The moment Ava lays eyes on her Mistress’s thick, impressive cock, something inside her shifts.

What was once mere curiosity transforms into an insatiable craving.

Now Ava finds herself returning to the dungeon again and again, desperate for more of the woman who has awakened desires she can no longer control.

FEATURES:  

- 250+ renders
- 15+ animations 
- Long story (aprox 2 hours), divided among several mini episodes which you can replay anytime.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
